title: Creative Testing Framework 2.0

seoMeta.title: Creative Testing Framework 2.0 | VedantVerse
seoMeta.description: Stop guessing. Build a data-backed creative testing matrix for social media ads.

summary: Creative fatigue is the #1 killer of ad account performance. Stop wasting budget on gut feelings and learn the scientific, system-driven creative testing model.
content:
# Creative Testing Framework 2.0: The Hook & Concept Matrix

To build winning ads predictably, you need a system that decouples your hooks from your body content. Here is the hook-concept test blueprint.

## Key Takeaways

* **Test Hooks First**: 3-second hook rate is the primary metric indicating top-of-funnel engagement.
* **Standardize Body Asset**: Keep the main video body identical while swapping the first 3 seconds to measure hook strength.
